title: PPP TV expands Campus Xposure tour to five more universities
excerpt: The youth-first show is adding Nairobi, Eldoret, and Mombasa stops with live DJ takeovers and creator labs.
author: PPP TV News Desk
body:
PPP TV is taking **Campus Xposure** nationwide with live DJ sessions, influencer meetups, and mentorship pits. Students can pitch creator ideas, win gear, and get featured on PPP TV playlists.

The new circuit lands at *JKUAT (Mar 28)*, *Moi University (Apr 4)*, and *Technical University of Mombasa (Apr 18)*. Catch live highlights on StarTimes CH.430 and all PPP TV socials.

title: Urban News goes fully live with audience polls and realtime clips
excerpt: Daily at 7:30pm, Urban News now lets viewers vote on stories, submit clips, and see poll results on-air.
author: Eugine Micah
body:
Urban News is now fully **live** with polls and clip drops. Viewers can text *430* or DM @ppptvke to push their takes to air. The desk runs English, Swahili, and Sheng for maximum vibe.

Segments now include *Trend Radar*, *Campus Check-in*, and *Plug of the Day* featuring new Kenyan hits.

title: DJ Culture releases Gengetone x Amapiano mashup
excerpt: Resident DJs drop a 35-minute mashup, premiered on PPP TV and now streaming on YouTube + TikTok Clips.
author: PPP Music Desk
body:
VDJ Jones and DJ Darlington teamed up for a **Gengetone x Amapiano** mashup recorded live at the PPP TV stage. Watch the premiere on PPP TV’s YouTube or catch TikTok snippets on @ppptv_.

The set lists new releases from Kenyan campus stars plus amapiano anthems sweeping Nairobi.

title: PPP TV opens new branded content slots for Q2
excerpt: Fresh inventory for brands: lower-third takeovers, show segment sponsorships, and on-site interactive ads.
author: Commercial Team
body:
PPP TV is opening **Q2 branded content** slots with bundled TV + digital reach. Packages include social story boosts, talent integrations, and live campus tour placement.

Email sales@ppptv.co.ke for rates. Advertisers can preview placements in the new PPP TV web experience.
